chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3207 of 2021 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1 For orders on office objection No.18. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2021 Mr. Yahya Iqbal, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khursheed Javed, D.A.G. Mr. Miran Muhammad Shah, A.A.G. Mr. Akhtar Hussain Jabbar, advocate for Respondent No.3 & 5. ------ A statement has been furnished on behalf of the FIA/Respondent No.2 mentioning therein that a letter dated 12.07.2017 has already been sent to Sub-Registrar Clifton Town-1 DHA Karachi for de-attachment of the property in question. Learned counsel for the petitioner after going through the said statement is satisfied and does not press instant petition any further, which stands disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE SM
